about-p1: My name is Lucas Sales, I am 25 years old and I live in Votorantim, São Paulo.
about-p2: Currently, I am in my 7th semester of Computer Science.
about-p3: I have solid experience in Java and Spring Boot, with Full-stack projects in production.
about-p4: Mastery of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for responsive Web development.
about-p5: Current focus on SaaS system architecture and ERP integrations.
about-p6: Enthusiastic about the practical application of Artificial Intelligence and UI/UX Design to optimize processes.
about-p7: I work as a Multiplatform Programmer at Input Tecnologia.
about-intro: My goal is to deliver value through clean code, lead with empathy, and contribute to innovative solutions.
proj-desc-love: Website I made as a Valentine's Day gift for my girlfriend. I included our photos, a dedicated playlist, and an interactive time counter.
proj-desc-seguranca: Academic extension project to bring knowledge about safe electrical practices to low-income communities, including an evaluative questionnaire.
proj-desc-ctus: Institutional landing page and digital collection for the Transdisciplinary Colloquium of UNIP Sorocaba. Developed with a focus on UX/UI, high performance, and Glassmorphism design.
proj-desc-brbee: Institutional and talent acquisition portal for a digital solutions brand. Features advanced UX, Glassmorphism design, mathematical horizontal scrolling, and AJAX form submission.
proj-desc-ouvemed: Multi-tenant SaaS system for medical management. Stands out for its Enterprise security architecture with granular RBAC, advanced JWT interception, and Generative AI (LLM).
ouvemed-lead: A platform created to solve one of healthcare's biggest bottlenecks: time spent on bureaucracy. Ouvemed autonomously automates the filling out of medical records, returning the doctor's full focus to the patient.
ouvemed-problem-desc: During a medical appointment, a large part of the time is consumed by typing the patient's history, symptoms, and prescriptions. This creates a barrier between the doctor and the patient (staring at the screen) and decreases the quantity and quality of daily consultations, generating professional fatigue and delays in clinics.
ouvemed-solution-desc: Through cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence, the system works as an invisible assistant. It captures the context of the clinical conversation, automatically structures the data into the standard medical format, and generates the medical record. The doctor just reviews and approves, ensuring much more human, agile, and screen-free care.
ouvemed-pillar1-desc: Strict Multi-tenant architecture. Data from one clinic operates in completely isolated silos from others, ensuring full compliance with data protection regulations.
ouvemed-pillar2-desc: Natural language processing (LLM) trained to understand medical jargon, dosages, and ICD codes, transforming informal dialogues into precise clinical documents.
ouvemed-pillar3-desc: Intelligent role hierarchy. Doctors, receptionists, and administrators have tailored access, ensuring the operational security of the clinic's workflow.
brbee-lead: A platform designed to reflect the innovation of a technological solutions brand. The portal combines an immersive design with ultra-high performance front-end engineering to convert visitors into clients and attract talent.
brbee-problem-desc: Technology brands suffer from a paradox: they sell innovation, but often their own institutional websites are heavy, stutter on mobile devices, and have forms that frustrate conversion. The first technical impression of a potential client or talent dictates the brand's credibility.
brbee-solution-desc: I built a lightweight and highly interactive ecosystem. The interface uses Glassmorphism minimalism guided by visual storytelling. The great differentiator is mechanical fluidity: complex animations and navigation occur without friction, keeping the user engaged until the conversion point.
brbee-pillar1-desc: Severe rendering optimization. Complex scroll animations are calculated with pure math in JavaScript and offloaded to the Graphics Card (Hardware Acceleration), eliminating stuttering even on older smartphones.
brbee-pillar2-desc: No page reloads that break the experience. Form submission for quotes and the talent pool is done asynchronously (Fetch API), retaining the lead in the conversion funnel smoothly.
brbee-pillar3-desc: High-level responsive interface logic. The system detects the device and rewrites its mechanical behavior — from a cinematic navigation on desktop to a native vertical experience (Scroll Snap) on mobile.
ctus-lead: Development of the official platform and digital collection for one of the institution's main academic events. A project focused on institutional credibility, file accessibility, and immersive design.
ctus-problem-desc: Academic events generally suffer from information dispersion. Schedules, submission rules, and, especially, the proceedings and articles published after the event are scattered across hard-to-find PDFs. CTUS needed a centralized hub that conveyed seriousness and organized this flow for students and professors.
ctus-solution-desc: I structured a robust institutional landing page that acts as a gateway and repository. The major differentiator was applying a Glassmorphism design, bringing a modern and sophisticated look to the academic environment without compromising the high-performance loading crucial for mobile network access on campus.
ctus-pillar1-desc: Use of interfaces with blur and transparency (backdrop-filter). This visual decision elevated the event's perceived value, breaking the rigid pattern of traditional academic websites.
ctus-pillar2-desc: Information architecture planned for the long term. The portal was built to support the continuous addition of proceedings and scientific articles from future editions with easy navigation.
ctus-pillar3-desc: Focus on Core Web Vitals. The use of native HTML, CSS, and JS with extreme optimization ensured highly accessible scores and fast loading times on Google Lighthouse.
seguranca-lead: A university extension project developed to democratize access to information about electrical safety in low-income communities, preventing serious domestic accidents through digital education.
seguranca-problem-desc: The lack of basic information about electrical installations and daily care in vulnerable households results in high rates of accidents and fires (many of which are 90% preventable). The big challenge is that technical information is usually rigid, inaccessible, or too complex for the general public to assimilate into their daily routine.
seguranca-solution-desc: I developed an interactive, user-friendly web platform with strong visual appeal to translate safety standards into practical tips. The system works as a digital primer, covering everything from child safety to equipment handling, engaging users through an evaluative questionnaire accessible directly via mobile.
seguranca-pillar1-desc: Designed with touch-friendly buttons and collapsible layouts. The structure was built to load quickly and work smoothly on smartphones, considering the internet limitations of these communities.
seguranca-pillar2-desc: To solidify the content in a playful way, the platform applies basic gamification principles, using interactive quizzes and real-time feedback to test the user's knowledge.
seguranca-pillar3-desc: Interface guided by a semantic system: electric blue for technology, yellow for attention/alerts, and green for safe actions, facilitating immediate visual comprehension for people of any age.
love-lead: A special project developed to capture memories and count the exact time of a relationship. Much more than just a static page, it is a Single Page Application focused on DOM manipulation, CSS animations, and responsive design.
love-problem-desc: The goal was to create a memorable and personalized digital Valentine's Day gift. More than just displaying photos, the idea was to build an immersive environment that connected interactive images, a dedicated soundtrack (via Spotify), and a precise chronological counter, creating a true 'living memory album'.
love-solution-desc: To ensure maximum fluidity and instant loading, I decided not to use heavy frameworks or third-party libraries (like Swiper.js for the carousel). All interactivity, precise time calculation, and slider mechanics were built from scratch using Vanilla JavaScript and direct DOM manipulation.
love-pillar1-desc: Development of a JS logic to accurately calculate the difference between the start date of the relationship (September 2021) and the exact moment of access, dynamically updating years, months, days, hours, minutes, and seconds every 1000ms.
love-pillar2-desc: Creation of an interactive photo slider (Polaroid style) made from scratch. I implemented support for keyboard navigation (arrows), clicks, and a 'Swipe' system for touch screens on mobile devices.
love-pillar3-desc: Use of CSS animations (keyframes) to create a dynamic floating background and DOM element injection to create a 'hearts effect' upon double-clicking anywhere on the screen.
contact-status-hob: Hobbies: Training Kickboxing, suffering for Corinthians, and taking care of my Shimpakus.
